rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low Q factor indicates broader frequency response.
suggestedActions: Verify component tolerances affect circuit performance.
Use proper safety equipment for high voltage/current work.

description.short: Calculate RC time constant — time to reach 63.2% charge/discharge.
description.long: Calculate RC time constant — time to reach 63.2% charge/discharge.

short_i18n.en: Calculate RC time constant — time to reach 63.2% charge/discharge.
short_i18n.tr: Kapasitörün %63,2 şarj/deşarj olması için geçen süreyi (RC zaman sabiti) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnung der RC-Zeitkonstante — Zeit bis 63,2% Ladung/Entladung.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la constante de temps RC — temps pour atteindre 63,2 % de charge/décharge.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la constante de tiempo RC — tiempo para alcanzar el 63.2% de carga/descarga.
short_i18n.ar: احسب ثابت الوقت RC — الوقت للوصول إلى 63.2% شحن/تفريغ.

long_i18n.en: Calculate RC time constant — time to reach 63.2% charge/discharge.
